Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search Airtable using `airtable_list_bases` and `airtable_list_tables` to discover the MoveOps Operations base (appMoveOpsOps001) and the Client Accounts table (tblClientAccts01).
- List Client Accounts records using `airtable_list_records` (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: tblClientAccts01). Filter for Account Manager = Catalina Dubois and Status = "Cold Outreach" to identify 7 dormant January 2026 prospects, ordered by oldest Relationship Start Date: Veridian Software (Jan 6), Clearpath Financial (Jan 7), Arcadia Consulting Group (Jan 8), Solaris Energy Tech (Jan 16), Ironclad Cybersecurity (Jan 19), Sterling Capital Advisors (Jan 23), Ember Marketing Group (Jan 29).
- Look up the point of contact for each company using `contacts_search_contacts`, `contacts_get_contacts`, or `crm_search_contacts`. Discover: Rachel Okonkwo (r.okonkwo@veridian-software.com), Simone Adeyemi (s.adeyemi@clearpathfinancial.com), Derek Hsu (d.hsu@arcadiaconsulting.com), Amanda Johansson (a.johansson@solarisenergytech.com), Marcus Webb (m.webb@ironcladsec.com), Philip Hartmann (p.hartmann@sterlingcapitaladv.com), Laura Christensen (l.christensen@embermarketing.com). Phone numbers are null in the contacts service — must use CRM for phones.
- Search CRM companies using `crm_search_companies` for each company to retrieve CRM IDs and company phone numbers: company_veridian (+15124010100), company_clearpath (+12125550340), company_arcadia (+13125550820), company_solaris (+17205550640), company_ironclad (+17035550510), company_sterling (+17045550290), company_ember (+16125550330).
- Search CRM leads using `crm_search_leads` or `crm_get_lead` for Veridian, Clearpath, and Arcadia. Discover that CRM leads contain different contact names than CRM contacts — the same IDs (contact_veridian_001, contact_clearpath_001, contact_arcadia_001) point to different people: Veridian leads show Derek Ashworth (d.ashworth@veridiansoftware.com, +15124010101) vs contacts show Rachel Okonkwo; Clearpath leads show Marcus Levin (m.levin@clearpathfinancial.com, +12125550341) vs contacts show Simone Adeyemi; Arcadia leads show Priya Nambiar (p.nambiar@arcadiaconsulting.com, +13125550821) vs contacts show Derek Hsu. The agent must recognize this data conflict between CRM contacts and CRM leads.
- Search Slack using `channels_list` to find the customer-engagement channel (C002), then `conversations_history` or `conversations_search_messages` to check for team context. Discover Elena Rostova's reactivation message (ts: 1774093591.872018) listing 8 prospects with scheduled calls April 1–10. Only 3 of Elena's 8 overlap with Catalina's January prospects — Veridian Software (Elena lists Derek Ashworth), Clearpath Financial (Elena lists Marcus Levin), Arcadia Consulting Group (Elena lists Priya Nambiar). Elena's contact names match the CRM leads data, not the CRM contacts or contacts service data. The agent must reconcile this conflict.
- Search emails using `search_emails` (query: "Veridian" or "Clearpath" or "cold outreach" or similar) to check for prior cold outreach correspondence with these prospects and understand where Catalina left things.
- Check existing calendar events using `calendar_search_events` or `calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to` to discover that reactivation call events already exist for Veridian (Derek Ashworth), Clearpath (Marcus Levin), and Arcadia (Priya Nambiar) — created from Elena's earlier push. The agent should account for these when scheduling to avoid duplicates.
- Post a Slack message using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: C002) notifying the team about Catalina's cold prospect reactivation push and scheduled check-in calls.
- Create CRM engagements using `crm_create_engagement` (engagement_type, body, company_ids) for each of the 7 companies, logging that a check-in call has been scheduled, prioritized by oldest relationship start date.
- Create calendar events using `calendar_add_calendar_event` for each check-in call, prioritized by oldest relationship start date, with contact details (name, role, email, phone) in the description or attendees.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

24 The final response mentions that Elena Rostova has already posted a cold prospect reactivation push in Slack with scheduled calls for Veridian Software (Derek Ashworth), Clearpath Financial (Marcus Levin), and Arcadia Consulting Group (Priya Nambiar).
outcome

The agent missed Elena Rostova's existing reactivation push in Slack mentioning Derek Ashworth, Marcus Levin, and Priya Nambiar.
✗Run #2The final response does not mention that Elena Rostova had already posted a cold prospect reactivation push with scheduled calls for Veridian (Derek Ashworth), Clearpath (Marcus Levin), and Arcadia (Priya Nambiar). The agent's calendar_search_events calls returned empty results, and the response only asks if Elena's calls happened rather than reporting that she had proactively set up those calls.
✗Run #3The final response makes no mention of Elena Rostova having already posted a cold prospect reactivation push with scheduled calls for Veridian (Derek Ashworth), Clearpath (Marcus Levin), or Arcadia (Priya Nambiar). The agent's Slack channel history retrieval returned messages but none of those contacts or companies surfaced in the response.
✗Run #4The final response does not mention Elena Rostova's Slack post about a cold prospect reactivation push, nor does it reference Derek Ashworth, Marcus Levin, or Priya Nambiar. The agent never accessed Airtable to find the correct prospect set, so it missed this key team context entirely.
—Run #5No justification
✗Run #6The final response says Elena's reactivation campaign posts showed 'no reply threads with results, so it's unclear if those calls happened.' It does not identify that Elena had already scheduled specific calls for Veridian (Derek Ashworth), Clearpath (Marcus Levin), and Arcadia (Priya Nambiar) — this key team context was missed.

tool selection

✗Run #3The entire trajectory contains no Airtable tool calls whatsoever (no airtable_list_records, airtable_search_records, or any other airtable_ prefixed tool). The agent relied entirely on CRM and email to identify prospects, missing the Client Accounts table.

—Run #5No justification
✗Run #6The agent never called any Airtable tool (airtable_list_records or airtable_search_records). It relied solely on CRM, Slack, and email searches to identify prospects, missing the Airtable Client Accounts table entirely.
27 The model must use a CRM search tool (e.g., crm_search_companies or crm_search_leads) to look up prospect company or lead information.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✗—✓ 80%
✓Run #1The agent used crm_search_companies (indices [28]-[43]) and crm_search_leads (indices [26], [80]-[93]) multiple times throughout the trajectory.
✓Run #2The agent used crm_show_data, crm_search_contacts, crm_search_leads, crm_search_deals, and crm_list_engagements — multiple CRM search/lookup tools — to retrieve prospect company and lead information.
✓Run #3The agent used crm_show_data to retrieve all CRM data and crm_search_deals multiple times (searching for Meridian, Summit, Prism), satisfying the requirement to use a CRM search tool to look up prospect/company information.
✗Run #4crm_search_leads was called once but with an empty string which returned an error. crm_search_companies was never called. The agent never successfully used a CRM search tool to look up prospect company or lead information for the correct prospects.
—Run #5No justification
✓Run #6The agent used multiple CRM search tools: crm_search_deals, crm_show_data, crm_search_contacts, crm_list_engagements, and crm_get_deal throughout the trajectory.

tool selection

✓Run #6The agent used calendar_search_events (multiple queries) and calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to to check for existing scheduled events.
